name: Particle
description: Particle is an IoT platform for managing, monitoring, and controlling connected devices at scale. Read device variables, call device functions, manage fleets, stream events, handle SIM cards, and manage firmware OTA updates.

capabilities.name: devices_list
capabilities.description: List all devices owned by the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: devices_get
capabilities.description: Get detailed information about a specific device.

capabilities.name: devices_create
capabilities.description: Claim a device to your account.

capabilities.name: devices_update
capabilities.description: Update device name, notes, or settings.

capabilities.name: devices_delete
capabilities.description: Unclaim a device from your account.

capabilities.name: devices_ping
capabilities.description: Ping a device to check if it is online.

capabilities.name: devices_call_function
capabilities.description: Call a function exposed by device firmware.

capabilities.name: devices_get_variable
capabilities.description: Read a variable exposed by device firmware.

capabilities.name: devices_signal
capabilities.description: Make a device LED shout rainbows for identification.

capabilities.name: diagnostics_get_last
capabilities.description: Get the latest diagnostic vitals from a device.

capabilities.name: diagnostics_list
capabilities.description: Get historical diagnostics for a device.

capabilities.name: diagnostics_refresh
capabilities.description: Request fresh diagnostics from a device.

capabilities.name: products_list_devices
capabilities.description: List all devices in a product fleet.

capabilities.name: sims_get
capabilities.description: Get SIM card details by ICCID.

capabilities.name: sims_get_data_usage
capabilities.description: Get data usage for a SIM card.
